hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['/usr/bin/python3','-m','py_compile',f],capture_output=True,text=True) if f.endswith('CLearIC.py') else None; sys.stdout.write('Syntax OK: '+f+'\n' if r and r.returncode==0 else ('SyntaxError: '+r.stderr if r else '')); sys.exit(r.returncode if r else 0)" 2>/dev/null || true
